title: Java Primitive Patterns
description: Match primitive types directly in a switch with primitive type patterns.
learningGoals: Match primitive types with case int, case long, and case double labels.
Replace instanceof-and-cast chains with primitive type patterns.
Note: primitive type patterns are a preview feature in Java 26, enabled with --enable-preview.

completionChecks.prompt: Which switch arm handles an int value in this preview feature?
completionChecks.explanation: Primitive type patterns let the switch match an int directly with the case int i arm.
